rationale: In the literature review, the cited paper is positioned within the key stream on advertising effects through awareness and consideration-set formation, not just as a generic background mention. The methods section then explicitly says the identification strategy is similar to Barroso and Llobet (2012), showing direct methodological borrowing for separating awareness versus preference effects as products age. While Sovinsky Goeree (2008) is treated as the main estimation template, this citation still meaningfully informs the empirical setup.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Barroso and Llobet (2012) as methodological precedent for identifying distinct awareness and preference channels of advertising in a consideration-set model. It applies that logic in a different context focused on celebrity endorsements, planned advertising, and unplanned media exposure.
